operators.title: Operators
operators.subtitle: Manage, approve and authorize operators on the platform.
operators.firstLoginNoteBefore: Admin-created operators do not receive a password in this form. After approval, the backend should send an invite token to the representative email. The operator opens
operators.approveConfirm: Are you sure you want to approve {{name}}? They will get dashboard access after approval.
operators.rejectConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to reject {{name}}'s application?
operators.onboardSubtitle: Add a transport business to the VietRide platform.
operators.activateHint: After document verification, the operator can receive bookings.

users.title: User management
users.subtitle: Monitor and manage VietRide passenger accounts.
users.passengerDetailHint: Passenger account used to book trips, send parcels and track transaction history on VietRide.
users.operatorAdminOnlyHint: System Admin can only create the operator admin account. Operator staff, drivers and assistants are created inside the operator dashboard.

vouchers.title: Voucher & promotions
vouchers.subtitle: Create and manage discount codes for users and service packages.
vouchers.subtitleLong: Manage discount codes for users and operators on the system.
vouchers.eventSectionDesc: These vouchers are created by admins to promote end users during events or on first signup.
vouchers.packageSectionDesc: These vouchers are bundled when operators purchase service packages. Manage packages on the packages page.
vouchers.emptyHint: Create a new voucher using the button above
vouchers.name: Name
vouchers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this voucher?
vouchers.createEventSubtitle: Create a voucher for events or new users
vouchers.createPackageSubtitle: Create a promotional voucher for service packages
vouchers.activateOnCreateHint: The voucher will be active and usable.
vouchers.packageDescPlaceholder: Promotion when operator buys a package...

stations.title: Platform station management
stations.subtitle: Normalize platform station data, merge duplicates, update station information, and deactivate invalid records.
stations.hardcodedNotice: Prototype UI with hardcoded data. API can be connected later.
stations.registryHint: Review platform-wide stations and operator links before merging or deactivating records.
stations.normalizeHint: Update canonical station name, address, city and coordinates.
stations.mergeHint: Move operator links from the source station into a valid platform station target.
stations.mergeRule: Merging preserves operator station links and marks the source as a duplicate record.
stations.requiredFields: Station name, address and city are required.
stations.invalidCoordinates: Coordinates must be valid latitude and longitude values.
stations.invalidMergeTarget: Please select a valid merge target.
stations.mergeIntoSelf: Cannot merge a station into itself.
stations.activeUseBlocked: This active station still has operator links. Merge it or clear active usage before deactivation.

packages.title: Service packages
packages.subtitle: Create and manage service packages for operators.
packages.subtitleLong: Create and manage service packages operators can purchase. Each package includes benefits, vehicle/route limits and promotional vouchers.
packages.createSubtitle: Create a new package for operators to purchase
packages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this package?
packages.featuresPlaceholder:
e.g.
Up to 5 vehicles
Up to 3 routes
Basic support
packages.activatePackageHint: Disable if operators should not purchase this package right now.
packages.voucherNote: Note: When an operator purchases this package, the system automatically creates a matching promotional voucher (e.g. 100K for Basic) they can use for their customers.

policies.title: Policy management
policies.subtitle: Manage terms and policies for operators and users.
policies.operatorInfo: These policies apply to operators on the platform, including terms of service and cancellation policies.
policies.userInfo: These policies apply to users on the platform, including privacy and safety guidelines.
policies.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this policy?
policies.contentHint: You can use line breaks to separate points (1. Point 1\n2. Point 2)

payouts.title: Operator payout approval
payouts.subtitle: Review and approve payout batches for operators.
payouts.subtitleLong: Reconcile revenue, approve payout batches and export weekly transfer orders.

walletSettlement.title: Platform wallet and settlement
walletSettlement.subtitle: Review platform wallet transactions and settlement records across operators.
walletSettlement.searchPlaceholder: Search operator, trip or settlement ID...
walletSettlement.notEligible: This settlement is not eligible for manual settlement.
walletSettlement.rule: Manual settlement is allowed only for eligible records and cannot be repeated once settled.

ragAudit.title: RAG knowledge base and conversation audit
ragAudit.subtitle: Manage RAG documents and review AI conversation logs for quality control.
ragAudit.documentsHint: Approve, reject or archive uploaded documents before ingestion.
ragAudit.auditHint: Review high-risk conversations and support intents.
ragAudit.approvalBlocked: Only pending documents can be approved.

revenue.title: Platform revenue
revenue.subtitle: Overview of GMV, commission and operator payouts.
revenue.detailDescription: Detailed reports by route and operator will appear here.

reports.title: System reports
reports.subtitle: Export reports, filter by date and operator.
